workDir.label: Work directory (session backups, etc.)
workDir.notWritable: This directory is not writable: {{error}}. Please choose another work directory.

form.pathPlaceholder: Select or enter an absolute path

workDir.hint: Set up independent work directories for different purposes, such as "Content Creation" or "Study Notes". Switch contexts anytime to avoid interference.

aliasHint.empty: Feishu remote only: specify this work directory in messages with @alias or "in <name> project…". Leave empty to match by name only.
aliasHint.withAlias: Feishu remote only: specify this work directory in messages with @alias or "in {{alias}} project…". For example with alias {{alias}}, you can send /sa @{{alias}} run tests.

validation.atLeastOne: Please add at least one work directory
validation.specifyDefault: Please specify a default work directory
validation.nameEmpty: Work directory name cannot be empty
validation.pathEmpty: Work directory path cannot be empty
validation.nameDuplicate: Work directory name must be unique
validation.pathDuplicate: Work directory path must be unique
validation.atLeastOneProfile: Please keep at least one work directory
validation.aliasSingle: Only one Feishu alias is allowed

parallelSessions.label: Max parallel chat sessions
parallelSessions.hint: Multiple sessions can send AI requests at the same time (including tool loops). When the limit is reached, you'll be asked to try again later.

discardChanges.title: Discard unsaved changes?
discardChanges.content: Changes you made in Settings have not been saved.

models.noModelsAvailable: No models available. Add or enable a model first.
models.preferredUnavailableHint: The selected model is unavailable; a fallback will be used at runtime.

add.namePlaceholder: Enter the model ID from your provider
add.hint: Helps the agent manage the context window. Leave empty if unsure.
add.fastLabel: Mark as fast model (for low-cost simple tasks)
add.visionLabel: Mark as vision model (supports image input and understanding)

apiServices.title: API services
apiServices.intro: Each service has its own API key and base URL. You may enable multiple services at once; only models supported by enabled services become available.

defaults.title: Model settings
defaults.intro: Configure three preferred default models. When Thinking is enabled, supported models show their reasoning process.
defaults.thinkingHint: Only applies to models that support extended thinking

llmService.maxServices: You can configure up to {{max}} LLM services
llmService.deleteContent: Delete this service? This cannot be undone.
llmService.apiKeyLabel: API Key (leave empty to keep current)
llmService.apiKeyHintConfigured: Key configured · entering a new value will overwrite it
llmService.baseUrlLabel: Base URL (optional; leave empty for Anthropic official)
llmService.testConnectionNeedModels: Select at least one supported model for this service before testing
llmService.supportedModelsRequired: Select at least one supported model to enable or save this service
llmService.validationNeedModels: Service "{{name}}" must support at least one model
llmService.activateNeedModels: Service "{{name}}" must support at least one model before it can be enabled

skills.autoDetect: Let AI choose Skills to load based on their descriptions
skills.alwaysLoadPlaceholder: Select Skills to load in every session
skills.deleteContent: This permanently deletes the user-level Skill directory. This cannot be undone.

tools.listIntro: When a tool is disabled, the agent cannot call it in chat. Related tasks may fail or fall back to other capabilities.

readFile.summary: Read file contents within the work directory.
readFile.disabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot view files and can only answer from existing conversation context.

editFile.summary: Modify existing files by snippet (find-and-replace editing).
editFile.disabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot edit files with diff-style changes; full file rewrites are also limited.

writeFile.summary: Create new files or overwrite entire files.
writeFile.disabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot create new files or rewrite files in full.

listDirectory.summary: List files and subdirectories within a directory.
listDirectory.disabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot browse the project directory structure.

grep.summary: Search file contents by keyword or regex within the work directory.
grep.disabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot perform full-text search on code or text.

runScript.summary: Run a Python script (requires your confirmation before execution).
runScript.disabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot execute Python scripts.

runShell.summary: Execute shell commands in the session work directory (requires your confirmation before execution).
runShell.disabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot run CLI commands like npm, git, etc. on your behalf.

runLarkCli.summary: Call the Feishu lark-cli to operate on messages, docs, calendars, etc.
runLarkCli.disabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot read or write Feishu resources via the Feishu CLI.

readFeishuAttachment.summary: Read attachment files from Feishu messages (read-only).
readFeishuAttachment.disabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot open Feishu attachment contents.

wechatSend.summary: Send text, images, or files to a WeChat user.
wechatSend.disabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot proactively send WeChat messages.

wechatReply.summary: Reply to the inbound message in the current WeChat remote session.
wechatReply.disabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot reply in WeChat remote sessions.

browser.summary: Open web pages in an isolated browser, read pages, and perform actions like clicking.
browser.disabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot access web pages or automate the browser.

browserDetect.summary: Check whether the Stagehand, Playwright, and Chromium dependencies required by Web access (browser) are ready.
browserDetect.disabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot auto-detect browser dependency status in chat.

listWorkDirs.summary: List configured work directories and the current remote session binding (Feishu/WeChat remote only).
listWorkDirs.disabledHint: When disabled, the remote agent cannot query the work directory list.

switchWorkDir.summary: Switch the work directory bound to the current remote session without affecting desktop or other sessions.
switchWorkDir.disabledHint: When disabled, the remote agent cannot switch work directories in the session.

switchSession.summary: Switch the desktop view to a specified remote session and sync its work directory (Feishu/WeChat remote only).
switchSession.disabledHint: When disabled, the remote agent cannot switch the desktop session view.

builtin.fallbackDisabledHint: When disabled, the agent cannot call this tool in chat.

switches.label: Tool toggles
switches.hint: Control which capabilities the agent can use in chat

script.label: Script execution
script.hint: Auto-run scripts, Python path, and timeouts

workspaceLayout.label: Directory layout
workspaceLayout.hint: Write base directory and extension-to-subdir mapping for new files

autoApprove.description: Auto-execute without a confirmation card when all conditions are met:
autoApprove.conditionInWorkDir: Path is inside the work directory
autoApprove.conditionNotSensitive: Not a sensitive path (keys, credentials, config dirs, etc.)
autoApprove.fallbackHint: Otherwise falls back to the "Show file changes" card.
autoApprove.confirmMessage: When enabled, write_file / edit_file calls that pass safety checks run without a card; oversized or sensitive paths still show confirmation.
autoApprove.confirmWarning: ⚠️ Path sandboxing and sensitive-directory protection still apply.

shell.boundaryDescription: Shell starts in the session work directory. The system scans command paths and warns on out-of-bounds or sensitive access; high-risk injection patterns are rejected outright. Shell cannot constrain all child-process behavior like file tools can. Do not confirm untrusted commands.
shell.outputHint: Feishu remote sessions always use plain text. Run interactive full-screen commands (less, vim, top, etc.) in an external terminal.
shell.sensitivePrefixesHelpIntro: List folder paths that need extra care. When AI uses Shell to touch these directories, you'll get a prominent warning and must confirm before execution.
shell.sensitivePrefixesHelpExample1: Team secrets, certificates, or production config directories
shell.sensitivePrefixesHelpExample2: Local database backups or internal credential folders
shell.sensitivePrefixesHelpExample3: Any directory you don't want AI to touch silently
shell.sensitivePrefixesHelpOutro: Leave empty if none apply. The system also protects common sensitive locations such as .ssh and .env.
shell.sensitivePrefixesPlaceholder: One path per line, e.g. D:\secrets
shell.executablePlaceholder: Leave empty for platform default (Windows: cmd, Unix: bash)
shell.emptyRules: No custom rules; everything requires confirmation by default

trust.title: Trusted shell commands
trust.hint: After trusting a prefix, later matching commands may include redirection or command substitution. Expansion-after-substitution is not AST-analyzed. Only trust prefixes you recognize.

autoAllow.title: Auto-allow model-generated scripts (content analysis now gates this)
autoAllow.description: This switch no longer bypasses safety analysis: dangerous scripts still ask or deny; safe scripts may skip confirm. run_shell still uses trusted commands or confirmation cards.
autoAllow.confirmMessage: Dangerous scripts still ask or deny; safe scripts that pass analysis may skip confirm.
autoAllow.confirmWarning: ⚠️ Content analysis is a heuristic gate, not a sandbox.

browser.depsNotReadyDescription: Click the button below to fix this in chat.
browser.stagehandModelLabel: Model used by the action engine
browser.stagehandModelPlaceholder: Leave empty to reuse the current LLM model (auto-converted to provider/model name)
browser.rateLimitTitleHint: Control request frequency to avoid triggering anti-bot measures on websites.
browser.rateLimitEnabledHint: When off, requests are not throttled and may trigger anti-bot blocks.
browser.rateLimitPerHourHint: Total request cap for long-running tasks.
browser.rateLimitPerDomainPerMinuteLabel: Max requests per domain per minute
browser.rateLimitModeHint: Wait: queue until a slot is available; Reject: return an error immediately.
browser.rateLimitMaxWaitSecHint: In wait mode, the longest time to wait when over the limit.
browser.rateLimitDisabledWarning: Rate limiting is off. High-frequency requests may trigger anti-bot measures, causing access denial or IP bans.
browser.trustedDomainsHint: No confirmation inside the list; others ask once per chat session.
browser.actTrustHelper: Browser actions on these domains skip confirmation across sessions.
browser.actSessionTrustHelper: After the first confirmation, later act actions on the same domain in this session run automatically.
browser.actHighRiskHelper: Act instructions matching these keywords always require confirmation and never use trust.
browser.actHighRiskRemoveWarn: Removing keywords reduces protection for automatic actions. Continue?
browser.allowHttpHint: When off, only https links are allowed.
browser.headlessHint: On runs in the background without a window; off shows browser actions.
browser.idleTimeoutLabel: Close idle browser component to free memory (seconds)

feishu.ownerBinding: Binding: send a p2p message from your Feishu account within {{minutes}} minutes
feishu.ownerReadonlyHint: Owner is written by the bind flow and is read-only. Only that account can drive the remote agent; group chats are disabled.
feishu.bindWindowHint: Within the time limit, send a private message to the Bot from your Feishu account to finish binding.
feishu.pairingCodeInstruction: Within {{minutes}} minutes, send "绑定 {{code}}" (or "bind {{code}}") to the Bot from your own Feishu account to finish binding.
feishu.pairingExpired: Pairing code expired. Please start binding again.
feishu.pairingCodeReminder: The pairing code is shown only once; do not forward it. Restart binding if this window is lost.
feishu.rebindConfirmContent: The current owner will be cleared immediately. You must finish binding within {{minutes}} minutes by sending a private message to the Bot from your Feishu account.
feishu.larkCliWriteRequiresConfirmHint: Off by default: Feishu CLI writes (messages, docs, calendar, etc.) skip confirmation. Writes can affect group chats, shared docs, and calendars—broader external impact than WeChat private reply. Turn on when you want confirmation.
feishu.notifyOnReceive: Send system notification when a command is received
feishu.sessionIdleLabel: Session resume: after last message sent (minutes; 0 = new session per message)
feishu.remoteConfirmInheritHint: For remote sessions this is equivalent to in-Feishu Y/N confirm.
feishu.remoteAllowLocalWrite: Allow remote commands to write local files
feishu.integrationHint: If Feishu MCP tools are configured, avoid enabling conflicting capabilities in the Tools tab.
feishu.ipcMissingBuild: This app build does not include Feishu IPC. Start from the feature/feishu-integration branch and rebuild the main process.
feishu.ipcMissingRebuild: This app build does not include Feishu IPC. Rebuild the main process.
feishu.installTimeout: Install timed out. Check your network or run npm install -g @larksuite/cli manually.
feishu.configuringApp: Initializing Feishu app; waiting for setup link (about 10–30 seconds)…
feishu.configBrowserOpened: Setup page opened in browser. Complete sign-in and wait…
feishu.configTimeout: Configuration timed out. If setup finished in the browser, click Re-check or turn on App configured manually.
feishu.configManualUrl: If the browser did not open, visit the setup link manually (see CLI output).
feishu.loginTimeout: Sign-in timed out. Complete authorization in the browser and try again.
feishu.loginBrowserOpened: Sign-in page opened in browser. Complete authorization.

wiki.rootPathLabel: Wiki root path (relative to work directory)
wiki.hideFromTreeLabel: Hide Wiki directory from file tree
wiki.interactiveIngestLabel: Confirm ingest highlights with user before ingest

workspaceLayout.enabledHint: When on, new agent files are organized by extension mapping; when off, behavior is unchanged.
workspaceLayout.writeDirConfirmEnabledLabel: Confirm write directory before first write
workspaceLayout.writeDirConfirmEnabledHint: Show candidate directories when a session first creates a file.
workspaceLayout.invalidSubdir: Must not contain path separators or ..
workspaceLayout.rulesHint: Uses the last extension; unmapped files go to the write directory root; applies to new files only.
workspaceLayout.securityHint: LLM-provided directory segments are discarded; final path is determined by your choice and mapping.

wechat.description: Control the desktop Agent from WeChat
wechat.descriptionHint: Send commands from your phone while away; results are sent back to WeChat.
wechat.unbindConfirm: Unlink WeChat? You will stop receiving remote commands.
wechat.listenFailed: Failed to start message listening. Check your network and try again.
wechat.sessionIdleLabel: Session resume: after last message sent (minutes; 0 = new session per message)
wechat.allowLocalWrite: Allow remote commands to modify local files
wechat.qrExpired: QR code expired — tap to refresh
wechat.networkFailed: Network error — check your connection and retry
wechat.loginFailed: Login failed — check network or scan again
wechat.accountError: Account error — try again or use another WeChat account
wechat.policyInheritRemoteHint: For remote sessions this is equivalent to in-WeChat confirm. Choose read-only to block remote writes.
wechat.verifyCode: Enter the pairing digits shown in WeChat on your phone
wechat.verifyCodeNotWaiting: Not waiting for a pairing code

remoteImCommon.hint: These options apply to both Feishu and WeChat remote commands and are written to both channel configs.
remoteImCommon.notifyOnReceive: Send a system notification when a remote command is received
remoteImCommon.sessionIdleLabel: Session resume: minutes after last message completes (0 = new session each time)
remoteImCommon.remoteAllowLocalWrite: Allow remote commands to write local files
remoteImCommon.restrictWritesAndOutboundHint: When on: blocks remote write_file/edit_file and WeChat outbound / Feishu write tools. Does not block side effects from run_script / run_shell.
remoteImCommon.remoteDenyOutbound: Deny remote outbound (WeChat send / Feishu write tools)
remoteImCommon.remoteBrowserRequiresConfirm: Require confirm for remote browser navigate/act
remoteImCommon.remoteBrowserRequiresConfirmHint: Affects Feishu/WeChat remote sessions only; desktop browser defaults are unchanged. When off, remote navigate/act skip confirm; screenshot/observe never require confirm.
remoteImCommon.remoteConfirmInheritHint: Deprecated: confirm is driven by per-tool switches; this policy is ignored.
remoteImCommon.senderAllowlistPlaceholder: Written by bind flow; not editable
remoteImCommon.senderAllowlistReadonlyHint: Feishu owner / WeChat bound user is read-only; remote requires a bound identity.
remoteImCommon.allowRemoteBrowserLabel: Allow remote sessions to use browser
remoteImCommon.allowRemoteBrowserHint: When enabled, Feishu/WeChat IM remote commands can use the browser to access the web. Off by default to reduce remote abuse risk.
